seo.og_title: 205 Queenstown Ave, Youngsville, LA 70592 — For Sale $465,000
seo.og_description: Single-Family — 4 bed / 2 bath / 2,202 sq ft. Offered at $465,000. Presented by Carrie Billeaud, REALTOR®, eXp Realty.

copy.hero_tagline: A modern farmhouse, newly built, where brick, beam, and brass meet in Youngsville.
copy.overview_heading: New Construction, Considered Down to the Fixtures
overview_paragraphs: Completed in 2026, this four-bedroom single-family home spans 2,202 square feet behind a cream-sided, black-doored facade that reads as quietly current rather than loud. A gray pitched roof with dormers, white architectural trim, and a columned front porch framed by brick entry columns set the register before the door is even opened.

Inside, the plan opens around an exposed-brick fireplace with a wood mantel, hardwood floors running throughout, and crown molding overhead. The kitchen anchors the living space with a large island, white and gray cabinetry, stainless steel double ovens and a gas range, a subway-tile backsplash, and wood-beam ceiling detail lit by pendant fixtures and a crystal chandelier.

The primary suite carries the same restraint into its bath: a freestanding soaking tub, dual marble vanities, a frameless glass shower, brass fixtures, and a walk-in closet fitted with built-in shelving. Beyond the rear doors, a covered patio with a built-in gas grill, a brick fireplace, and ceiling fans opens to a fenced backyard on a 0.17-acre lot, two-car garage included.
copy.pull_quote: Brick and beam indoors, a fireplace and gas grill under the patio roof — the living space simply continues outside.

feature_groups.title: Kitchen & Living
items: Open kitchen with a large island and white-and-gray cabinetry
Stainless steel double ovens and a gas range
Subway-tile backsplash with pendant lighting and a crystal chandelier
Wood-beam ceiling detail over hardwood floors
Exposed-brick fireplace with a wood mantel and crown molding

feature_groups.title: Primary Suite & Baths
items: Primary bath with a freestanding soaking tub and dual marble vanities
Frameless glass shower with marble-veined tile and brass fixtures
Marble flooring and ribbed wainscoting detail
Walk-in closet with built-in white shelving
Bedrooms with wood-plank tray and vaulted ceilings, skylight, and French doors

feature_groups.title: Outdoor & Utility
items: Covered patio with a built-in gas grill and brick surround
Second patio fireplace with wood-sheathed ceiling and ceiling fans
Fenced backyard with a metal privacy fence and mowed lawn
Laundry room and mudroom with built-in shelving and cabinetry
Two-car garage with black multi-panel doors and concrete driveway

location_paragraphs: The home sits at 205 Queenstown Ave in Youngsville, Louisiana, within the 70592 postal area and the wider Lafayette metropolitan region of Acadiana. It occupies a 0.17-acre lot in a setting of manicured lawns and low landscape beds.
New construction on a modestly scaled parcel, the property offers the convenience of a maintained, level yard enclosed for privacy, with covered outdoor living oriented to the fenced rear grounds.
location_points: Located in Lafayette Parish, within the Acadiana region of south Louisiana
Part of the greater Lafayette metropolitan area
Fenced rear yard with a metal privacy fence
Concrete driveway serving an attached two-car garage
Covered patio living oriented to the backyard
copy.cta_sub: 205 Queenstown Avenue is available to tour by appointment. To see the home for yourself, contact Carrie Billeaud at eXp Realty — 337-258-5379.
